name: Aneca
description_short: ANECA Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering auto loans, credit cards, share certificates, and free credit monitoring through SavvyMoney.
description_long:
ANECA Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered, member-owned credit union operating under NCUA insurance. The organization emphasizes community investment and member benefits through various financial products and educational initiatives. Their brand positioning centers on being 'Different That Way,' suggesting a focus on member-centric values and service quality.

ANECA offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (5.74% APR), MasterCard credit cards (11.99% APR), share certificates (3.75% APY), money market accounts (2.02% APY), and online banking services. Members can access free credit scoring and reporting through SavvyMoney, which provides real-time credit monitoring, change alerts, dispute tools, and a score simulator. The credit union also provides loan calculators, savings calculators, and quick online loan applications.

The organization distinguishes itself through member engagement programs including annual scholarship awards ($10,000 total annually through ANECA and The ANECA Foundation), rewards programs on credit and debit cards (double points promotion at grocery stores and wholesale clubs through June 2026), and community financial education. They offer a debit card contest with prizes (Samsung TV) and maintain physical branch locations with extended hours.

As a federally insured credit union, ANECA operates on a non-profit, member-owned model rather than pursuing shareholder profits. The free credit monitoring tool is a genuine member benefit, though rates advertised (5.74%-11.99% APR range) suggest competitive but not exceptional loan pricing. Limited information is available regarding membership requirements, account minimum balances, or fee structures from the website provided.
services: Auto loans at 5.74% APR with payment calculator
MasterCard credit cards at 11.99% APR with rewards program
Online and mobile banking with account access
Free SavvyMoney credit score and full credit report monitoring
Credit change alerts and notifications for report modifications
Credit report dispute and error correction tools
Credit score simulator showing impact of financial decisions
Online loan application with quick approval process
Branch locations with extended hours and ATM access
pros: Free credit score, full credit report, and credit monitoring through SavvyMoney with no impact on credit score
Credit monitoring includes change alerts, dispute tools, score simulator, and personalized credit improvement tips
Annual scholarship program awarding $10,000 to members and designated colleges
Rewards programs offering double points at grocery stores and wholesale clubs with credit/debit cards
Multiple loan calculators and savings calculators available on website for financial planning
Physical branch locations with extended hours plus online and mobile banking options
Member-owned non-profit structure with NCUA federal insurance protection
cons: Credit card APR of 11.99% is mid-to-high range and no rewards details are specified beyond promotional categories
Website does not disclose membership requirements, account minimums, or fee structures
Limited transparency on auto loan terms beyond the advertised 5.74% APR rate
No information provided about whether credit union serves all states or has geographic membership restrictions
Money market account rate of 2.02% APY is below current high-yield savings account alternatives (typically 4-5%)
best_for: Members seeking free credit monitoring and score tracking without hard inquiries or membership fees
Auto loan borrowers looking for competitive rates below 6% APR with community-focused lending
Credit union members interested in rewards-based debit and credit cards with scholarship opportunities
Individuals wanting to dispute credit report errors using built-in dispute tools within their banking portal
diagnosis: ANECA Federal Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members seeking free credit monitoring integrated with their banking relationship, competitive auto loans, and engagement in community-focused financial services. The primary caveat is lack of transparency regarding membership eligibility, account requirements, and fee structures—prospective members must contact the credit union directly to determine access and account details.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Aneca — Credit Union in Shreveport, LA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Aneca — NCUA-insured credit union in Shreveport, LA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
